era: Hip-Hop. E=6 -- post-E=7 trio descent. Self-released. Scene sustainer. Independence spectrum endpoint. v1.49.325.

location.formative: Seattle hip-hop community. Self-release platforms. Working artist ecosystem.

members.name: Renz
members.note: Self-released. No label. Scene sustainer. Direct to digital platform.

associated_musicians.name: Raz Simone
associated_musicians.relationship: Independence spectrum neighbor. Degree 183 (Cold Recordings). Label vs self-release.

associated_musicians.name: Macklemore
associated_musicians.relationship: Same ecosystem, different scale. Degree 180. LLC vs self-release. Both independent.

theory_nodes.concept: Self-released independence -- the most fundamental form. No label, no LLC, no infrastructure. Just the artist and the digital platform. The endpoint of the independence spectrum.
examples: No Nastymix. No LLC. No Cold Recordings.
theory_nodes.description: Self-released. Most fundamental independence. Spectrum endpoint.

genealogy.relationship: Renz at 184. The self-released endpoint of the independence spectrum.

theory_nodes.concept: Scene sustainers -- the working artists who keep culture alive without the spotlight. The 90% of any scene. The foundation that enables peaks.
theory_nodes.description: Scene sustainers. Working artists. The 90% that maintains culture.

theory_nodes.concept: Post-trio descent (E=7 -> E=6) -- after three consecutive E=7 entries (181-183), energy descends to E=6. Natural gradient. Maximum energy cannot be sustained indefinitely.
theory_nodes.description: Post-trio descent. E=7 to E=6. Natural gradient.

genealogy.relationship: Renz at 184. Energy descends after the trio.

theory_nodes.concept: Independence spectrum (177-184) -- eight degrees documenting the full range: indie label, own label, own LLC, artist label, self-release. Complete map of Seattle hip-hop independence.
theory_nodes.description: Independence spectrum. 8 degrees. Full range documented.

genealogy.relationship: Renz at 184 completes the independence spectrum.

cross_references.relationship: INDEPENDENCE SPECTRUM! Cold Recordings (label) vs self-released (no label). The spectrum continues to endpoint.
LINEAGE! Nastymix (owned label) vs self-released (no label). Two ends of independence, 5 degrees apart.
SCALE! #1 hits (LLC) vs scene sustainer (self-release). Both independent. Different scales.
ENERGY DESCENT! E=7 trio (181-183) then E=6 at 184. Natural gradient.
E=6 PAIR! Both E=6. Both scene contributors. Different eras.
